# Read the uploaded file
path = "/mnt/data/file-SHG38w1hiWPL6hmSCQpaot-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:2000]
import re, json, textwrap, itertools, sys, math, statistics, random

text = open("/mnt/data/file-SHG38w1hiWPL6hmSCQpaot-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()
# Find quoted spans between double quotes
spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]*)"', text):
    start = m.start(1)
    end = m.end(1)
    content = m.group(1)
    spans.append((start,end,content))
len(spans), spans[:5]

# Build the citations list with labels
citations = []
for idx,(start,end,content) in enumerate(spans):
    # determine type
    if idx in (0,1):
        ctype = "Aya"
    else:
        ctype = "Hadeeth"
    # sanity check substring
    assert text[start:end] == content
    citations.append({
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": content,
        "citation_type": ctype
    })
citations
